name: Kodak Film Colour Gold 36 200
description: Kodak GOLD 200 is a medium-speed daylight-balanced color negative film offering a versatile combination of vivid color saturation.

features.Key Features :: Daylight-Balanced Color Negative Film | ISO 200/24° in C-41 Process | Fine Grain and High Sharpness | Wide Exposure Latitude | Rich Color Saturation
features.What’s In The Box :: Kodak GOLD 200 Color Negative Film (35mm Roll Film, 36 Exposures)
